scripts.desktop: bun install --cwd conductor-web/frontend && bun run --cwd conductor-web/frontend dev & cargo tauri dev --manifest-path conductor-desktop/Cargo.toml ; kill %1 2>/dev/null
scripts.desktop:build: bun install --cwd conductor-web/frontend && bun run --cwd conductor-web/frontend build && cargo tauri build --manifest-path conductor-desktop/Cargo.toml
scripts.web: bun install --cwd conductor-web/frontend && bun run --cwd conductor-web/frontend dev & cargo run --bin conductor-web ; kill %1 2>/dev/null
scripts.build: cargo build && bun install --cwd conductor-web/frontend && bun run --cwd conductor-web/frontend build
